languages.text: "...Подкрепления не ожидаются. Корифей-еретик во дворе вместе с последователями."

traits.locale_text: "...Подкрепления не ожидаются. Корифей-еретик во дворе вместе с последователями."

languages.text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

languages.text: “……不会有援军了。异端教首就在庭院里，和他的追随者在一起。”
languages.original_text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

traits.locale_text: “……不会有援军了。异端教首就在庭院里，和他的追随者在一起。”

languages.text: « ... Ils n'attendent pas de renforts. Le coryphée hérétique est dans la cour avec son entourage. »
languages.original_text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

traits.locale_text: « ... Ils n'attendent pas de renforts. Le coryphée hérétique est dans la cour avec son entourage. »

languages.text: "Destek beklenmiyor. Kâfir Coryphaeus, müritleriyle birlikte avluda."
languages.original_text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

traits.locale_text: "Destek beklenmiyor. Kâfir Coryphaeus, müritleriyle birlikte avluda."

languages.text: «... No se esperan refuerzos. El hereje Corifeo está en el patio con sus seguidores».
languages.original_text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

traits.locale_text: «... No se esperan refuerzos. El hereje Corifeo está en el patio con sus seguidores».

languages.text: "... Es werden keine Verstärkungen erwartet. Der Ketzer Coryphaeus ist mit seinen Getreuen im Innenhof."
languages.original_text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

traits.locale_text: "... Es werden keine Verstärkungen erwartet. Der Ketzer Coryphaeus ist mit seinen Getreuen im Innenhof."

languages.text: 「…援軍は来ない。異端のコーリファウスは庭に仲間と共にいる。」
languages.original_text: "...No reinforcements are expected. Heretic Coryphaeus is in the courtyard with his followers."

traits.locale_text: 「…援軍は来ない。異端のコーリファウスは庭に仲間と共にいる。」
